message: Hello! I'm your BPMN Modeling Agent. I'll analyze the task now and start planning the diagram.
I've analyzed the task and defined 8 goals for the model.
Iteration 1 — setting up the participants (pools). Insurance Company will be expanded (main process). Customer and External Assessor will be collapsed as external interaction partners.

I’ll now model the full end-to-end claim handling process inside the Insurance Company pool (with lanes), including message exchanges with the collapsed Customer and External Assessor pools, the €1,500 decision, and the 10-business-day deadline while waiting for the assessor report.
I've reviewed the completed model. Found 11 issue(s) — details below.
⚠️ 3 critical issue(s) detected. Automatically starting correction pass 1/3…

I’ll address the 3 critical issues by (1) making the waiting responsibility explicit by moving the event-based wait and both catch events into the Claims System lane, and (2) fixing the final rejection path so the rejection message is sent from the same lane as the informing activity. I’ll also clarify the assessor report catch label to remove any ambiguity.
I've reviewed the completed model. Found 9 issue(s) — details below.
⚠️ 1 critical issue(s) detected. Automatically starting correction pass 2/3…
I’ll fix the structural messaging inconsistency on the final rejection path by making the rejection-sending activity the actual sender (SendTask) and ending with a plain EndEvent (no message).
I've reviewed the completed model. Found 7 issue(s) — details below.
⚠️ 1 critical issue(s) detected. Automatically starting correction pass 3/3…

Fixing the critical messaging inconsistency on the final rejection path: keep the SendTask as the single sender and make the end event plain, then attach the message flow to the SendTask (not the EndEvent).
I've reviewed the completed model. Found 5 issue(s) — details below.
⚠️ After 3 correction attempt(s), 1 critical issue(s) remain. Please review manually.
